meaning: 蟾ｴ諡画悍蟯媼闖ｲ蠕句ｮｾ隘ｿ驛ｨ]
examples: An outrigger canoe glides across crystal waters off Palawan Island in the Philippines.
Fireworks light up the sky to launch the Christmas tree display along a bay walk in Palawan city, Philippines.
Philippine officials say a coast guard patrol spotted the Chinese fishing Saturday near the island town of Balabac, in southern Palawan.
The USS Guardian also struck the reef south-east of Palawan island on 17 January.
Danny, a school teacher on Palawan island, in the west, was accused of rape.
